metadata.description: A working library of 42 framework-agnostic UX and product-design principles packaged as Agent Skills.

plugins.name: perception-and-hierarchy-principles
plugins.description: Visual perception, hierarchy, layout, and the structuring of attention.

plugins.name: cognition-and-learnability-principles
plugins.description: Mental models, complexity reduction, memory, and learnability.

plugins.name: interaction-and-control-principles
plugins.description: Affordance, feedback, errors, and user control.

plugins.name: aesthetics-and-emotion-principles
plugins.description: Beauty, perceived quality, brand personality, and emotional response.

plugins.name: process-and-robustness-principles
plugins.description: Iteration, accessibility, reliability, and design process.
